fields.Name: Constant Contact
fields.Description: Constant Contact V3 REST API connector for email marketing. Supports contacts, contact lists, custom fields, tags, email campaigns/activities, segments, and async bulk activities. Auth: OAuth2 Authorization Code flow (access tokens valid 24h; refresh t...

fields.Name: Contacts
fields.Description: Contacts — the primary contact record with name, email, phones, addresses, custom fields, list memberships, and taggings. Use email_address as the natural key for upsert.

fields.Name: contact_id
fields.Description: Unique ID for each contact resource

fields.Name: first_name
fields.Description: The first name of the contact.

fields.Name: last_name
fields.Description: The last name of the contact.

fields.Name: job_title
fields.Description: The job title of the contact.

fields.Name: company_name
fields.Description: The name of the company where the contact works.

fields.Name: birthday_month
fields.Description: The month value for the contact's birthday. Valid values are from 1 through 12. You must use this property with birthday_month.

fields.Name: birthday_day
fields.Description: The day value for the contact's birthday. Valid values are from 1 through 12. You must use this property with birthday_day.

fields.Name: anniversary
fields.Description: The anniversary date for the contact. For example, this value could be the date when the contact first became a customer of an organization in Constant Contact. Valid date formats are MM/DD/YYYY, M/D/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY/M/D, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-M-D,M-D-YYYY, or M-DD-YYYY.

fields.Name: update_source
fields.Description: Identifies who last updated the contact; valid values are Contact or Account.

fields.Name: create_source
fields.Description: Describes who added the contact; valid values are Contact or Account. Your integration must accurately identify create_source for compliance reasons; value is set when contact is created.

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: System generated date and time that the resource was created, in ISO-8601 format.

fields.Name: updated_at
fields.Description: System generated date and time that the contact was last updated, in ISO-8601 format.

fields.Name: deleted_at
fields.Description: For deleted contacts (email_address contains opt_out_source and opt_out_date), shows the date of deletion.

fields.Name: custom_fields
fields.Description: Array of up to 25 custom_field subresources.

fields.Name: phone_numbers
fields.Description: Array of up to 3 phone_numbers subresources.

fields.Name: street_addresses
fields.Description: Array of up to 3 street_addresses subresources.

fields.Name: list_memberships
fields.Description: Array of up to 50 list_ids to which the contact is subscribed.

fields.Name: taggings
fields.Description: Array of tags (tag_id) assigned to the contact, up to a maximum of 50.

fields.Name: notes
fields.Description: An array of notes about the contact listed by most recent note first.

fields.Name: ContactLists
fields.Description: Contact lists — subscription lists for sending email campaigns. Contacts can belong to multiple lists.

fields.Name: list_id
fields.Description: Unique ID for the contact list

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: The name given to the contact list

fields.Name: description
fields.Description: Text describing the list.

fields.Name: favorite
fields.Description: Identifies whether or not the account has favorited the contact list.

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: System generated date and time that the resource was created, in ISO-8601 format.

fields.Name: updated_at
fields.Description: Date and time that the list was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

fields.Name: deleted_at
fields.Description: If the list was deleted, this property shows the date and time it was deleted, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

fields.Name: membership_count
fields.Description: The total number of contacts that are members in a list. Does not apply to segment type lists.

fields.Name: ContactCustomFields
fields.Description: Account-level custom field definitions. Up to 100 per account. Types include string, date, datetime, currency, text_area, number, boolean, single_select, multi_select (Sept 2025 expansion).

fields.Name: custom_field_id
fields.Description: The custom_field's unique ID

fields.Name: label
fields.Description: The display name for the custom_field shown in the UI as free-form text

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: Unique name for the custom_field constructed from the label by replacing blanks with underscores.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Specifies the type of value the custom_field field accepts: string or date.

fields.Name: updated_at
fields.Description: System generated date and time that the resource was updated, in ISO-8601 format.

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: Date and time that the resource was created, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

fields.Name: ContactTags
fields.Description: Tags — unstructured string labels that can be applied to contacts. Account-unique by name.

fields.Name: tag_id
fields.Description: The ID that uniquely identifies a tag (UUID format)

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: The unique tag name.

fields.Name: contacts_count
fields.Description: The total number of contacts who are assigned this tag.

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: The system generated date and time when the tag was created (ISO-8601 format).

fields.Name: updated_at
fields.Description: The system generated date and time when the tag was last updated (ISO-8601 format).

fields.Name: tag_source
fields.Description: The source used to tag contacts.

fields.Name: EmailCampaigns
fields.Description: Email campaign definitions — top-level campaign with one or more campaign activities. Supports Draft/Scheduled/Executing/Sent statuses.

fields.Name: campaign_activities
fields.Description: Lists the role and unique activity ID of each campaign activity that is associated with an Email Campaign.

fields.Name: campaign_id
fields.Description: The unique ID used to identify the email campaign (UUID format).

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: The system generated date and time that this email campaign was created. This string is readonly and is in ISO-8601 format.

fields.Name: current_status
fields.Description:
The current status of the email campaign. Valid values are:
  • Draft — An email campaign that you have created but have not sent to contacts.
  • Scheduled — An email campaign that you have scheduled for Constant Contact to send to contacts.
  • Executing — An email campaign that Constant Contact is currently sending to contacts. Email campaign activities are only in this sta

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: The descriptive name the user provides to identify this campaign. Campaign names must be unique for each account ID.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Identifies the type of campaign that you select when creating the campaign. Newsletter and Custom Code email campaigns are the primary types.

fields.Name: type_code
fields.Description:
The code used to identify the email campaign `type`.
  • 1 (Default)
  • 2 (Bulk Email)
  • 10 (Newsletter)
  • 11 (Announcement)
  • 12 (Product/Service News)
  • 14 (Business Letter)
  • 15 (Card)
  • 16 (Press release)
  • 17 (Flyer)
  • 18 (Feedback Request)
  • 19 (Ratings and Reviews)
    • <

fields.Name: updated_at
fields.Description: The system generated date and time showing when the campaign was last updated. This string is read only and is in ISO-8601 format.

fields.Name: EmailCampaignActivities
fields.Description: Email campaign activity — the sendable email variation tied to a campaign. Contains subject, HTML content, from_name, from_email, list/segment targeting.

fields.Name: campaign_activity_id
fields.Description: Identifies a campaign activity in the V3 API.

fields.Name: campaign_id
fields.Description: Identifies a campaign in the V3 API.

fields.Name: role
fields.Description:
The purpose of the individual campaign activity in the larger email campaign effort. Valid values are:
  • primary_email — The main email marketing campaign that you send to contacts. The primary_email contains the complete email content.
  • permalink — A permanent link to a web accessible version of the primary_email content without any personalized email

fields.Name: contact_list_ids
fields.Description: The contacts that Constant Contact sends the email campaign activity to as an array of contact list_id values. You cannot use contact lists and segments at the same time in an email campaign activity.

fields.Name: segment_ids
fields.Description: The contacts that Constant Contact sends the email campaign activity to as an array containing a single segment_id value. Only format_type 3, 4, and 5 email campaign activities support segments. You cannot use contact lists and segments at the same time in an email campaign activity.

fields.Name: current_status
fields.Description:
The current status of the email campaign activity. Valid values are:
  • DRAFT — An email campaign activity that you have created but have not sent to contacts.
  • SCHEDULED — An email campaign activity that you have scheduled for Constant Contact to send to contacts.
  • EXECUTING — An email campaign activity Constant Contact is currently sending to contacts. Email campaign

fields.Name: format_type
fields.Description:
Identifies the type of email format. Valid values are:
  • 1 - A legacy custom code email created using the V2 API, the V3 API, or the legacy UI HTML editor.
  • 2 - An email created using the second generation email editor UI.
  • 3 - An email created using the third generation email editor UI. This email editor features an improved drag and drop UI and mobile responsiveness.

fields.Name: from_email
fields.Description: The email "From Email" field for the email campaign activity. You must use a confirmed Constant Contact account email address. Make a GET call to /account/emails to return a collection of account emails and their confirmation status.

fields.Name: from_name
fields.Description: The email "From Name" field for the email campaign activity.

fields.Name: reply_to_email
fields.Description: The email "Reply To Email" field for the email campaign activity. You must use a confirmed Constant Contact account email address. Make a GET call to /account/emails to return a collection of account emails and their confirmation status.

fields.Name: subject
fields.Description: The email "Subject" field for the email campaign activity.

fields.Name: html_content
fields.Description: The HTML or XHTML content for the email campaign activity. Only format_type 1 and 5 (legacy custom code emails or modern custom code emails) can contain html_content.

fields.Name: template_id
fields.Description: Identifies the email layout and design template that the email campaign activity is using as a base.

fields.Name: permalink_url
fields.Description: The permanent link to a web accessible version of the email campaign content without any personalized email information. The permalink URL becomes accessible after you send an email campaign to contacts.

fields.Name: preheader
fields.Description: The email preheader for the email campaign activity. Only format_type 3, 4, and 5 email campaign activities use the preheader property.

fields.Name: Segments
fields.Description: Audience segments — dynamic contact groups based on filter criteria.

fields.Name: name
fields.Description: The segment's unique descriptive name.

fields.Name: segment_id
fields.Description: The system generated number that uniquely identifies the segment.

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: The system generated date and time that the segment was created (ISO-8601 format).

fields.Name: edited_at
fields.Description: The system generated date and time that the segment's name or segment_criteria was last updated (ISO-8601 format).

fields.Name: Activities
fields.Description: Async bulk activity jobs (contact import/export, bulk list/tag add/remove, bulk delete). Use Activities endpoints to create jobs and poll for completion.

fields.Name: activity_id
fields.Description: Unique ID for the bulk activity job (UUID).

fields.Name: state
fields.Description: Current state: initialized, running, completed, cancelled.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Activity type (e.g. contacts_json_import, contact_exports, contact_delete, add_list_memberships, remove_list_memberships, contacts_taggings_add, contacts_taggings_remove).

fields.Name: created_at
fields.Description: ISO-8601 creation timestamp.

fields.Name: updated_at
fields.Description: ISO-8601 last-updated timestamp.

fields.Name: percent_done
fields.Description: Progress percent 0-100.

fields.Name: activity_errors
fields.Description: Array of activity errors (JSON-encoded).
